# MoneyMath

> A suite of free financial tools for everyday money decisions. Built by Ojas Labs.

## Products

- Calculators (https://moneymath.pro): 28 free financial, health, and utility calculators including mortgage, compound interest, BMI, tax, paycheck, and more. No sign-up required.
- Credit Card Rewards (coming soon): Compare credit cards, maximize rewards, and find the best card for your spending.
- Public API (coming soon): Access credit card data and financial calculations programmatically.

## About

MoneyMath helps people understand their finances without jargon or sign-ups. All tools are free and run entirely in your browser.

## Built By

Ojas Labs (https://ojaslabs.dev) — an indie software studio.

## Contact

https://moneymath.pro/contact
